descriptionShort: NHL game footage: Brad Maybush (Buffalo Sabres) vs. Matt Harvey (Boston Bruins), October 9, 1991.
descriptionLong: This is a professional NHL game-footage fragment from October 9, 1991, featuring two 1987 Richmond Sockeyes alumni competing at the highest level. Brad Maybush played for the Buffalo Sabres and Matt Harvey for the Boston Bruins in this matchup, documenting their respective pro-career progression following their junior-A championship season.
